evaluation: MIDA — re-run LOSO on target dataset with each fold's training set augmented by the full auxiliary pool (the other 3 datasets). n and computation identical to LOSO (Care-PD paper, sec. 4.2 / Appendix D.4).

rationale.mida: See videomae_mida.py for full rationale (verbatim Care-PD MIDA protocol).
rationale.single_stage_fit: Convex linear probes converge to the same solution regardless of init — fitting directly on (target_train ∪ auxiliary) is mathematically equivalent to 'fine-tuning from a LODO checkpoint'.
rationale.no_sample_weighting: Each LOSO fold's target-train split already contains ~(n-1)/n of the cohort — comparable in scale to the auxiliary pool.
rationale.comparison_frame: LODO vs. MIDA vs. LOSO — identical to the framing used in the Care-PD paper.
